title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions in Surat is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions:
ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions!
